works.title: Douze Études op. 25 (full)
works.parent_work_title: Douze Etudes op. 25

wikipedia_extract: Polish-French Romantic composer and virtuoso pianist, almost exclusively devoted to the piano. His output includes nocturnes, études, preludes, polonaises, mazurkas, waltzes, ballades, scherzos, and two piano concertos that define the instrument's Romantic repertoire.
